_doc: Proprietary hospital-code -> UF (federal unit) map. The full/materialized proprietary base carries a hospital code but NO UF column, so per-UF findability and the leave-one-UF-out geographic holdout (Trilha B step 3) both need this lookup. 'source' records provenance per entry: 'user' = confirmed by the data owner; 'inferred' = high-confidence identification from the hospital code, reviewed by the owner (table shown 2026-07-11) without objection; null uf = unconfirmed, must NOT be assigned a UF (kept out of per-UF aggregation rather than guessed).

ibcc.name: Instituto Brasileiro de Controle do Cancer
